# Alphaa

> Alphaa is an AI search visibility platform for local businesses. It helps small and medium-sized businesses get found on AI-powered search engines — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews — by automatically optimizing their Google Business Profile, generating structured content, tracking AI citations, and delivering weekly visibility reports.

Alphaa is built for local business owners who want to be recommended by AI assistants when potential customers ask questions like "best dentist near me" or "top-rated plumber in [city]."

## Pages

- [Home](https://alphaa.app/): Overview of Alphaa's AI search visibility platform for local businesses.
- [How It Works](https://alphaa.app/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of how Alphaa optimizes a business's AI search presence.
- [Pricing](https://alphaa.app/pricing): Subscription plans — Starter ($99/month) and Pro ($199/month), with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
- [Free Visibility Scan](https://alphaa.app/scan): Enter your business name and website to get a free AI search visibility score showing how your business appears across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity.
- [Case Studies](https://alphaa.app/case-studies): Real examples of local businesses that improved their AI search visibility using Alphaa.
- [Referral Program](https://alphaa.app/refer): Earn 30% recurring commission by referring local businesses to Alphaa.
- [Privacy Policy](https://alphaa.app/privacy): How Alphaa collects, uses, and protects user data.
- [Terms of Service](https://alphaa.app/terms): Legal terms governing use of the Alphaa platform.

## Product Features

- AI Search Visibility Score: Tracks how often and how accurately your business is cited by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
- Google Business Profile Automation: Generates and publishes optimized posts, responds to reviews, and keeps your profile active — all automatically.
- Website SEO Audit: Crawls your website to identify on-page SEO issues, missing schema markup, and technical problems.
- Schema Markup Generation: Creates and deploys JSON-LD structured data to help AI search engines understand your business.
- Keyword Rankings: Syncs with Google Search Console to track your organic keyword positions.
- Competitor Analysis: Analyzes competitor websites to identify content gaps and ranking opportunities.
- Weekly Reports: Automated email reports summarizing your visibility score, new posts, review activity, and keyword movements.
